channel.title: ServiceNow — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by ServiceNow (sn).

item.title: CVE-2026-0542 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Remote Code Execution in ServiceNow AI Platform
item.description: ServiceNow has addressed a remote code execution vulnerability that was identified in the ServiceNow AI platform. This vulnerability could enable an unauthenticated user, in certain circumstances, to execute code within the ServiceNow Sandbox. Servic…

item.title: CVE-2025-12420 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Privilege Escalation in ServiceNow AI Platform
item.description: A vulnerability has been identified in the ServiceNow AI Platform that could enable an unauthenticated user to impersonate another user and perform the operations that the impersonated user is entitled to perform. ServiceNow has addressed this vulner…

item.title: CVE-2025-11449 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Reflected Cross Site Scripting in ServiceNow AI Platform
item.description: ServiceNow has addressed a reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability that was identified in the ServiceNow AI Platform. This vulnerability could result in arbitrary code being executed within the browsers of ServiceNow users who click on a special…

item.title: CVE-2025-11450 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Reflected Cross Site Scripting in ServiceNow AI Platform
item.description: ServiceNow has addressed a reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability that was identified in the ServiceNow AI Platform. This vulnerability could result in arbitrary code being executed within the browsers of ServiceNow users who click on a special…

item.title: CVE-2025-3089 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Broken Access Control in ServiceNow AI Platform
item.description: ServiceNow has addressed a Broken Access Control vulnerability that was identified in the ServiceNow AI Platform. This vulnerability could allow a low privileged user to bypass access controls and perform a limited set of actions typically reserved f…

item.title: CVE-2025-3648 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Data Inference in Now Platform via Conditional ACLs
item.description: A vulnerability has been identified in the Now Platform that could result in data being inferred without authorization. Under certain conditional access control list (ACL) configurations, this vulnerability could enable unauthenticated and authentica…

item.title: CVE-2025-0337 · 7.1 HIGH — Authorization bypass in Now Platform
item.description: ServiceNow has addressed an authorization bypass vulnerability that was identified in the Washington release of the Now Platform. This vulnerability, if exploited, potentially could enable an authenticated user to access unauthorized data stored with…

item.title: CVE-2024-5890 · 5.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — HTML Injection in the Assessment plugin
item.description: ServiceNow has addressed an HTML injection vulnerability that was identified in the Now Platform. This vulnerability could potentially enable an unauthenticated user to modify a web page or redirect users to another website. ServiceNow released updat…

item.title: CVE-2024-8924 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Blind SQL Injection in Core Platform
item.description: ServiceNow has addressed a blind SQL injection vulnerability that was identified in the Now Platform. This vulnerability could enable an unauthenticated user to extract unauthorized information. ServiceNow deployed an update to hosted instances, and…

item.title: CVE-2024-8923 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Sandbox Escape in Now Platform
item.description: ServiceNow has addressed an input validation vulnerability that was identified in the Now Platform. This vulnerability could enable an unauthenticated user to remotely execute code within the context of the Now Platform. ServiceNow deployed an update…

item.title: CVE-2024-5217 · 9.8 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️ — Incomplete Input Validation in GlideExpression Script
item.description: ServiceNow has addressed an input validation vulnerability that was identified in the Washington DC, Vancouver, and earlier Now Platform releases. This vulnerability could enable an unauthenticated user to remotely execute code within the context of…

item.title: CVE-2024-5178 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Incomplete Input Validation in SecurelyAccess API
item.description: ServiceNow has addressed a sensitive file read vulnerability that was identified in the Washington DC, Vancouver, and Utah Now Platform releases. This vulnerability could allow an administrative user to gain unauthorized access to sensitive files on…

item.title: CVE-2024-4879 · 9.8 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️ — Jelly Template Injection Vulnerability in ServiceNow UI Macros
item.description: ServiceNow has addressed an input validation vulnerability that was identified in Vancouver and Washington DC Now Platform releases. This vulnerability could enable an unauthenticated user to remotely execute code within the context of the Now Platfo…

item.title: CVE-2023-3442 · 7.7 HIGH — Missing Authorization in Jenkins plug-in for ServiceNow DevOps
item.description: A missing authorization vulnerability exists in versions of the Jenkins Plug-in for ServiceNow DevOps prior to 1.38.1 that, if exploited successfully, could cause the unwanted exposure of sensitive information. To address this issue, apply the 1.38.1…

item.title: CVE-2023-3414 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) in Jenkins Plug-in for ServiceNow DevOps
item.description: A cross-site request forgery vulnerability exists in versions of the Jenkins Plug-in for ServiceNow DevOps prior to 1.38.1 that, if exploited successfully, could cause the unwanted exposure of sensitive information. To address this issue, apply the 1…

item.title: CVE-2023-1298 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: ServiceNow has released upgrades and patches that address a Reflected Cross-Site scripting (XSS) vulnerability that was identified in the ServiceNow Polaris Layout. This vulnerability would enable an authenticated user to inject arbitrary scripts.

item.title: CVE-2022-43684 · 9.9 CRITICAL — ACL bypass in Reporting functionality
item.description: ServiceNow has released patches and an upgrade that address an Access Control List (ACL) bypass issue in ServiceNow Core functionality. Additional Details This issue is present in the following supported ServiceNow releases: * Quebec prior to Patch 1…

item.title: CVE-2023-1209 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities exist in ServiceNow records allowing an authenticated attacker to inject arbitrary scripts.

item.title: CVE-2022-46389 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability found on logout functionality
item.description: There exists a reflected XSS within the logout functionality of ServiceNow versions lower than Quebec Patch 10 Hotfix 11b, Rome Patch 10 Hotfix 3b, San Diego Patch 9, Tokyo Patch 4, and Utah GA. This enables an unauthenticated remote attacker to exec…

item.title: CVE-2022-46886 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: There exists an open redirect within the response list update functionality of ServiceNow. This allows attackers to redirect users to arbitrary domains when clicking on a URL within a service-now domain.

item.title: CVE-2022-39048 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in ServiceNow UI page assessment_redirect
item.description: A XSS vulnerability was identified in the ServiceNow UI page assessment_redirect. To exploit this vulnerability, an attacker would need to persuade an authenticated user to click a maliciously crafted URL. Successful exploitation potentially could be…
